chunks.title: Description of the Sea and Lavers
chunks.reason: Describes the construction and placement of the bronze sea, oxen, lavers, lampstands, tables, and court doors.

chunks.title: Completion of Utensils by Huram-abi
chunks.reason: Details the specific work done by Huram-abi, including pillars and networks, and notes where the items were cast.

chunks.title: Furniture of the Inner Sanctuary
chunks.reason: Lists the golden altar, tables, lampstands, and various gold utensils used inside the temple.
